posts.author: Keem (Hakeem Baba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am wondering how I can setup an integration connection view/page like the examples below

Screenshot 2022-11-15 at 20.51.572308×1230 87.9 KB

Screenshot 2022-11-15 at 20.52.331926×1178 171 KB

I cant seem to find any reference in the developer documentation that points to how this can be done. I am setting up a feature integration recipe and I will like use this view to help users connect to a third party application.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Keem!

You can use the Authorization URL from your app’s integration feature.

You can use this endpoint to ask the user to input credentials related to a third party platform, and then redirect the user back to monday.

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
